title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Are you sure I can have all of these?!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thank you! ♪ With this many, my sisters are
gonna go wild!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: ...I might keep one for myself too.
